title: Requesting a New Laptop or Peripheral Hardware
text:
Q: How do I request a new laptop or peripheral hardware?
A: To request a new laptop or peripheral hardware, please follow these steps: Windows: Step 1: Open the company intranet and navigate to the IT Helpdesk section. Step 2: Click on 'Hardware Requests'. Step 3: Fill out the 'New Hardware Request Form' with your details, specifying the type of laptop or peripheral you need. macOS: Step 1: Open the company intranet and go to the IT Helpdesk section. Step 2: Select 'Hardware Requests'. Step 3: Complete the 'New Hardware Request Form' with your information, indicating the desired laptop or peripheral. Step 4: Ensure you provide a justification for the request, such as project requirements or replacement needs. Step 5: Submit the form. Step 6: You will receive a confirmation email once your request is submitted. Step 7: The IT team will review your request and may reach out for further information. Step 8: Once approved, you will be notified about the next steps for receiving your new hardware.
